006package com.stuypulse.robot.commands.shooter;
007
008import com.stuypulse.robot.subsystems.shooter.Shooter.ShooterState;
009
010public class ShooterSetShoot extends ShooterSetState {
011
012    public ShooterSetShoot() {
013        super(ShooterState.SHOOT);
014    }
015}
